caption: A man wearing a tall, grey, textured wig, glasses, and black headphones sits in a room decorated with numerous framed photographs on the wall. He is dressed in a white button-down shirt with a red bow tie and beige suspenders. A black microphone on a stand is positioned in front of him. In the background, there are white storage bins and clothing items, including a shirt with the word "LEE" visible. On the left side of the scene, a logo featuring a microphone icon and the text "BOSS TALK JOY PODCAST" is overlaid on the image. Another similar logo with "BOSS TALK JOY" appears partially obscured behind him. Across the sequence of frames, the man remains in a seated position, maintaining a relatively steady posture while slightly shifting his head and facial expression as he speaks.
